ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Time when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Sent, Received) */,
  "transaction_value" REAL /* Value of the transaction */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Pending, Completed, Failed) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* External reference number for the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes for the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the transaction */,
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit log entry for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_audit_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_log_id") REFERENCES audit_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, account manager, auditor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., Sent, Received) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Completed, Reviewed) */,
  "transaction_ids" TEXT /* List of transaction IDs included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction related to the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "transaction_value" REAL /* Transaction value at the time of the action */,
  "status_before" TEXT /* Transaction status before the action */,
  "status_after" TEXT /* Transaction status after the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_exceptions" (
  "exception_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exception record */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction that caused the exception */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exception */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the exception has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the exception */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the exception was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exception_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_exceptions_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_exceptions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
